_readme: CC0 plant models from Poly Haven (https://polyhaven.com), fetched 2026-07-19. Format: .gltf + external .bin + jpg textures (diff = albedo, nor_gl = OpenGL normal, arm = AO/roughness/metallic packed). Units are meters, Y-up, indexed triangles — matches engine conventions in docs/game/model-pipeline.md. NOTE: the engine loader (src/assets/mod.rs parse_gltf_mesh/load_gltf) uses only the FIRST mesh's FIRST primitive, so multi-mesh assets need repacking (see repack field per asset) before they render fully.

assets.name: Grass Medium 02
assets.structure: 5 meshes = 5 standalone grass-clump variants (714 / 1760 / 1215 / 2489 / 1664 tris), one shared material
assets.suggested_use: ground-cover grass clump (garden tiles, wild terrain scatter)
assets.repack: split into one GLB per variant (each already game-budget); naive load renders only variant 1 (714 tris), which is usable as-is

assets.name: Fern 02
assets.structure: 4 meshes = 4 standalone fern variants (2384 / 2248 / 784 / 816 tris), one shared material
assets.suggested_use: wild shrub / forest-floor fern (also fits shaded garden beds)
assets.repack: split into one GLB per variant; naive load renders variant 1 (2384 tris), usable as-is

assets.name: Shrub 01
assets.structure: 1 mesh, 1 primitive, 1 material — loads fully with the current first-primitive loader
assets.suggested_use: wild shrub / hedge strip (low wide ground shrub)
assets.repack: none needed structurally (single primitive), but 156k tris is over game-prop budget — decimate to ~15-25k for scatter use, or reserve as a hero plant

assets.name: Potted Plant 01
assets.structure: 4 meshes: pot base (7008 tris), pot body (56878), soil ring (5440), leaves (106900); 2 materials (pot, leaves)
assets.suggested_use: interior potted plant (ship rooms, homestead interiors) — hero decoration
assets.repack: REQUIRED — naive load shows only the pot base without leaves; join all 4 meshes into one primitive and export GLB; decimate leaves (106k tris) toward ~20k for a prop-budget version

assets.name: Fir Sapling
assets.structure: 3 meshes = 3 tree variants (a/b/c), each 2 primitives (branches ~500 tris + twigs 124k-157k tris); 2 materials; uses optional KHR_materials_specular + KHR_materials_ior (not in extensionsRequired, safe to ignore)
assets.suggested_use: young tree / garden hero sapling (~1.3 m tall)
assets.repack: REQUIRED — naive load shows only a bare 546-tri branch skeleton (twigs are the 2nd primitive); per variant, merge branches+twigs into one primitive and decimate twigs hard (target ~20-40k tris per tree) before scatter use

assets.name: Pine Sapling Small
assets.structure: 3 meshes = 3 tree variants (b/a/c), each 2 primitives (bark ~500 tris + twigs 122k-142k tris); 2 materials; uses optional KHR_materials_specular + KHR_materials_ior (not in extensionsRequired, safe to ignore)
assets.suggested_use: young pine tree (~1.3 m) — forest edges, homestead planting
assets.repack: REQUIRED — naive load shows only a bare ~490-tri trunk (twigs are the 2nd primitive); per variant, merge bark+twigs into one primitive and decimate twigs (target ~20-40k tris) before scatter use
